# gen_server demo — per-process apps generated from the .art.
#
# Layout (directory discipline, base_dir=demo):
#   demo/nodes/      — demo_runtime library (hand-written node impls +
#                      platform/runtime + nanopb proto). NOT generated.
#   demo/p1,p2,p3/   — one app per `cluster Applications` member,
#                      generated by `artheia gen-app-composition`
#                      (main.cc + CMakeLists.txt). Each links demo_runtime.
#
# This top-level project builds all three apps in one tree, naming the
# binaries p1/p2/p3 (the start_cmd is bin/<ident>; install copies them
# into bin/). Each demo/p<i>/ is ALSO a standalone CMake project (it
# add_subdirectory's ../nodes) so it can be built on its own.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(gen_server_demo C CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

# Shared runtime library (built once).
add_subdirectory(nodes)

# One binary per application member. Output name = the cluster-member
# ident (p1/p2/p3) so it matches start_cmd bin/<ident> and the
# app_sup leaf in executor.json.
foreach(ident p1 p2 p3)
    add_executable(${ident} ${ident}/main.cc)
    target_link_libraries(${ident} PRIVATE demo_runtime)
endforeach()
